# Agent Guidelines

## REQUIRED: Use akm workflow — do not edit YAML directly

1. Run `akm workflow next 'workflow:configure-inkwell-service'` to start
2. Follow the step instructions exactly
3. Complete each step: `akm workflow complete <run-id> <step-id>`
4. Do NOT edit service.yaml before completing the current workflow step

## If you need the schema

Run `akm show skill:inkwell` — field names and value types are there.
